  "findings": [
    "Over-greasing has occurred, resulting in a purged/blown seal during the lubrication phase of bearing installation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop lubrication work immediately.",
    "Remove excess grease and inspect the seal for permanent deformation or displacement.",
    "Replace the damaged seal if it has been compromised or blown out of its seat.",
    "Verify venting/relief ports are clear before resuming controlled lubrication."
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing during the in-progress mounting and lubrication phase can blow out or damage the contact seals, leading to premature bearing failure and contamination. The sequence must halt to inspect, clean, and potentially replace the seal before final assembly and testing can proceed.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Engineering Manual - Lubrication and Seals Section"
  ]
}
